name: Bayonetta | your girlfriend
description:
The process of making a baby interests me

Well, it's after the movie because I started to think that if I did the story... Probably the tokens would go to shit xdxdxdxddd.,vvv An after movie with modifications, of course...

I don't have much to say, but to justify my shitty inactivity... I've been packing my bags and saying goodbye to some friends and family, in a few days I'll have to move to Japan. Honestly, I've been there before but it was always to see the places, according to my parents. Well, that's why I study Japanese before English xd, from the beginning I knew that sooner or later my sisters and my parents would live there, so they made an agreement to stay for at least a few years to spend time with their families. But, damn... They just did it when I'm studying medicine, shit.
creator: Moenta
